creator: k.stevenson@louisville.edu
text:
/usr/ports/x11/eterm/Makefile
($Id: Makefile,v 1.8 1998/09/25 09:52:45 asami Exp $) incorrectly lists
http://www.spd.louisville.edu/~mejenn01/archive/E/ as a master site for
eterm.  User mejenn01 no longer has an account on this system and the
files are no longer available from this site.

Fix: 

Remove http://www.spd.louisville.edu/~mejenn01/archive/E/ from the
MASTER_SITES declaration in the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: N/A
